executive_strategic_insight.core_theme: Autonomous pentesting at scale — making continuous security validation accessible to mid-market
executive_strategic_insight.strategic_focus: Horizon3 is expanding NodeZero beyond one-time pentests into continuous attack surface validation. They're adding internal network testing alongside external, and building compliance reporting to justify budget.
executive_strategic_insight.ecosystem_momentum: 5 new integrations including ServiceNow vulnerability response, Tenable.io import, and Qualys asset sync. Building the 'pentest results into your existing workflow' story.
executive_strategic_insight.persona_shift: Moving from security consultants/pentesters to IT security managers at mid-market companies who need pentest results without pentest expertise.
executive_strategic_insight.pricing_model_shift: Annual subscription with unlimited tests (previously per-test pricing). Major shift to encourage continuous use over point-in-time assessments.

engineering_capacity.velocity_assessment: Medium — monthly releases but each contains significant capability additions

intelligence_signals.job_board_signals: Hiring offensive security researchers, exploit developers, and enterprise sales reps. Sales hiring suggests Series B/C growth push.
intelligence_signals.target_users: IT security managers, compliance officers, and MSSPs serving mid-market
intelligence_signals.monetization_approach: Annual SaaS subscription. Moving to unlimited-tests model to increase stickiness and justify as 'always-on' security investment.
intelligence_signals.differentiators: Autonomous operation (no agent required), realistic attack simulation, fast time-to-value (results in hours not weeks). Main competitor is manual pentesting firms.

areas_of_focus: Explore BAS (breach & attack simulation) partnerships or build
Add attack path context to Sentry EASM findings
Build pentest-grade reporting for EASM results

product_specific.Sentry (EASM): NodeZero's external testing directly overlaps with EASM — they find exposures AND prove exploitability
product_specific.ASM: Horizon3's asset discovery + exploitation chain is more actionable than passive ASM scanning
